description_long: This object is a rectangular, glossy black electronic device with a split design on its top surface, featuring a smooth left section and a right section with diagonal vent patterns. The front face displays a disc slot and a prominent circular button with a white 'X' logo, characteristic of the Xbox One gaming console. The rear side is equipped with multiple ports, including HDMI, USB, Ethernet, and power connectors, indicating its function as a multimedia hub. The left and right sides are mostly solid, with the right side featuring a single USB port. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with internal metal components for structural support and heat dissipation. Its compact, boxy form is designed for placement on flat surfaces such as entertainment centers or desks.
description: A glossy black rectangular electronic device with vented and smooth surfaces, front disc slot, and multiple rear ports, resembling a gaming console.
description_view_0: The front view shows the disc slot, a large circular button with the 'X' logo, and a split glossy/vented top surface.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the diagonal vent pattern covering half the top and the solid, featureless side panel.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals multiple connectivity ports, including HDMI, USB, Ethernet, and power input, as well as the vented top.
description_view_3: The right side view displays a single USB port and the continuation of the vented and smooth surface design.
